responsibilities: AI/ML Engineer with experience in designing scalable machine learning pipelines and NLP-driven applications across airline, oil & gas, and e-commerce domains.
Proficient in Python and SQL, with hands-on experience in ML/DL frameworks such as Scikit-learn, TensorFlow and NLP libraries like spaCy and NLTK.
Integrated Generative Al techniques, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines and promptengineering with LLMs to enhance analytical outputs and automate complex data interpretations.
Performed extensive data preprocessing and feature engineering, handling missing data, outliers, and feature selection to improve model accuracy and generalization.
Conducted model evaluation and performance monitoring using metrics such as RMSE, MAE, Precision, Recall, F1-score, and implemented model retraining strategies for continuous improvement.
Applied version control using Git to manage code changes and collaborate efficiently with team members.
Collaborated within Agile teams, participating in daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and code reviews to ensure alignment with project timelines and deliverables.
Documented end-to-end ML workflows, model architectures, and evaluation results, ensuring reproducibility and knowledge transfer within the team.

education.degree: Bachelor Of Science in Computer Science
